headlines.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?
headlines.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

headlines.title: After losing one billionaire tax battle, Gavin Newsom prepares to wage another
headlines.description: California’s governor, who is considering a White House run, proposed an expansive national wealth tax last week, as well as an initiative to give Americans a stake in AI.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Apple’s shares plunge after it hikes prices on iPads and laptops
headlines.description: Apple said AI-fueled demand for memory chips has sent prices soaring, a market dynamic that some call “RAMageddon.”

headlines.title: Poppi founder Allison Ellsworth on building a billion-dollar soda business
headlines.description: Allison Ellsworth, the founder of the viral soda brand Poppi, sits down with NBC News' Savannah Sellers to discuss how she turned a personal health issue into a billion-dollar cultural phenomenon.

headlines.title: Simplifying Insurance: Types of Coverage, Credit Impact, More
headlines.description: Whether it's auto, home or health, insurance can help manage financial risk. Financial expert Ted Jenkin joins TODAY with tips to understand the fine print and why you should review your policies annually, the importance of shopping around and how your credit score impacts coverage.

headlines.title: Need a Little Extra Cash? How to Put More Money in Your Account
headlines.description: Between your bank, your employer and the government, there are lots of ways to find extra cash so NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY to share methods to put money back in your pocket. Tips include taking advantage of bank and credit card bonuses, searching unclaimed money sites and more.

headlines.title: Some Latino business owners in Texas regret Trump votes heading into midterms
headlines.description: Some Latino Trump voters in southern Texas discuss buyer's remorse after helping flip the area red, with business owners concerned about the president's economy and immigration policies. NBC News' Valerie Castro reports ahead of the midterms.

headlines.title: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan sees clues to the U.S. consumer in the pet food aisle
headlines.description: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan is one of few people who really know in real time how Americans are contending with rising inflation and high gas prices.

headlines.title: U.N. agency pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation effort as ship is struck off Oman
headlines.description: Iran warned that any ship not following its approved route in the strait “will be dealt with accordingly.”

headlines.title: Key measure of inflation climbed in May as surging oil prices pushed costs higher
headlines.description: Inflation is rising — but U.S. consumers seem to be shrugging it off. A key measure of price growth accelerated in May as surging oil prices pushed costs higher
